pattern: Finding the trees on the enclosing fence is a convex-hull problem where points lying exactly on a hull edge must also be kept.
hints: The minimum rope outline is the convex hull of the points.
Unlike a strict hull, collinear points on the boundary must be included, so do not discard them.
Use a monotonic-chain hull but keep boundary-collinear points; with the small coordinate range, deduplicate the final set of perimeter points.

stress.description: random distinct integer points in the allowed coordinate box
stress.generator_python:
def gen(rng, size):
    n = max(1, min(400, size))
    pts = set()
    attempts = 0
    while len(pts) < n and attempts < n * 20:
        attempts += 1
        pts.add((rng.randint(0, 30), rng.randint(0, 30)))
    return [[list(p) for p in pts]]
